text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Keep going straight ahead. Okay... And stop.
Now remove your blindfolds!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Father, Mother... Welcome to your celebration!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text: Wow! Did you prepare all this for us, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! And all my friends helped out! We prepared
more than just this venue for you, though.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um, okay! We're ready, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey there! Welcome to your party! ♪ I'm Curren,
your stylist for today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We have a chic suit for the gentleman, and a pure
white, A-line dress for the lady. I used the outfits
you wore during your wedding ceremony as
inspiration. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this brings back memories! Your friends
arranged this for us as well? Incredible...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting! Here's the food we prepared
for you! It's a full course of French cuisine from a
popular restaura—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I spilled the soup! Wh-what should I do?! I have to
clean it up and get another serving!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Rice is going to run herself ragged again!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Can you please help me out?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Could someone please go to the kitchen and
prepare another bowl of soup? I'll clean up this
mess!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll handle the cleaning, Rice. ♪ Don't you think
it's about time you get ready for you-know-what?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to continue with the proceedings while
we wait for your food to arrive.

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, thank you. So you're here to help out Rice
as well?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's the very least we could do for her, since Rice
does so much for us.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Her desire to make everyone happy provides us
with more emotional support than I can describe.

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Our Rice really does all that...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We were thrilled when she asked us to aid her in
doing something for the two special people she
loves so much.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I believe the time has arrived. If you would please
direct your attention to the stage.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Father, Mother. I'm sorry for always causing you
so much trouble...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not right... I want to thank you... Thank
you for always caring so much about me.

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rice...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And... thank you to everyone for helping me out
with this party. I'm so happy right now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've always thought that I was a burden to you all
since I'm always messing things up...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to everyone, I finally realized that
asking for help and being relied on aren't burdens
to bear—they're opportunities to cherish.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to do my best to make you all
happy! Here's to looking out for each other from
now on as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of grand applause and the joyful
weeping of Rice Shower's parents reverberate
throughout the party venue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to Tracen Academy, I overhear
a discussion between Rice Shower's parents, who
happen to be nearby.

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how much Rice has grown up. I'm
delighted, but it's a bittersweet feeling, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It is. But nothing will ever change the fact that
she's our daughter. Just look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is reluctant to part with her parents
even briefly and continues to wave vigorously
until the two of them disappear from view.
